design_philosophy: Neo-brutalist vibrancy. The platform balances gamified, colorful learning (Archetype 6) with structured, high-contrast clarity required for constitutional reading (Archetype 4 influences). It uses stark borders, hard shadows, and bold typography to create a memorable, non-governmental experience that appeals to both kids and competitive exam aspirants.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight text-[#1A237E]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-extrabold tracking-tight text-[#1A237E]

cards.classes: bg-white border-2 border-[#1A237E] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A237E] rounded-xl p-6 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#1A237E]

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B35] text-white font-bold border-2 border-[#1A237E] shadow-[3px_3px_0px_#1A237E] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A237E] hover:bg-[#E65A28] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFD54F] text-[#1A237E] font-bold border-2 border-[#1A237E] shadow-[3px_3px_0px_#1A237E] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#1A237E] hover:bg-[#FACC15] transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#1A237E] font-bold border-2 border-transparent hover:border-[#1A237E] rounded-lg px-6 py-3 transition-all

inputs.style: bg-white border-2 border-[#1A237E] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 text-base text-[#1A237E] placeholder:text-[#1A237E]/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-[#FF6B35] focus:shadow-[3px_3px_0px_#FF6B35] transition-all

header.style: bg-[#FDFBF7] border-b-2 border-[#1A237E] sticky top-0 z-50 py-4

layout.grid_strategy: Tetris Grid for marketing pages (asymmetric spans); Control Room Grid (dense bento box) for Analytics Dashboard. Ensure all grids are responsive starting mobile-first.

icons.usage: Use bold, distinct icons to match the neo-brutalist border weight.

animation.hover_states: Hard translations (e.g., hover:-translate-y-1) paired with expanding solid shadows rather than blurred drop-shadows.
animation.page_transitions: Staggered fade-ins with upward slight movement for bento grid children.

hero_background.description: Indian students studying, to be used with a heavy blend mode or gradient overlay (e.g., bg-[#1A237E]/80 mix-blend-multiply) to allow text readability.

constitution_article_header.description: Law books for the header of the reading sections.

game_snake_ladder.description: Board game cover for the selection menu.

institution_parliament.description: Indian Parliament building for the Legislature institution filter card.

game_spin_wheel.description: Wheel of fortune style background for the spin game.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the landing/marketing page. Do not use generic Shadcn cards there; build custom neo-brutalist divs with the provided shadow and border utility classes.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For the Analytics Dashboard, use Shadcn UI components (Tables, Charts) but HEAVILY customize them: override default light-gray borders with `border-[#1A237E]` and apply the custom hard shadows.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Include `data-testid` on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, game interactables).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Ensure font installations: add standard Google Fonts links for `Cabinet Grotesk` (or substitute with `Outfit` if unavailable) and `Figtree`.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Never use teal or purple as primary colors. Stick strictly to the Saffron/Navy/Off-White palette provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Use Framer Motion for the game elements (Spin the Wheel rotation, Snake and Ladder token movement, Card flipping).
